join6529.metadata.title: Join 6529
join6529.metadata.description: A state-aware guide for connecting a wallet, creating a profile, and joining public Waves on 6529.io.
join6529.title: Join 6529
join6529.subtitle: Own your identity, fund public-good art, and shape what comes next.
join6529.progress.label: Your progress
join6529.current.wallet.title: Connect your wallet
join6529.current.wallet.body: A wallet is your crypto account; connect it when you are ready to create, vote, collect, or post.
join6529.current.wallet.error: Wallet connection did not complete. Try connecting again.
join6529.current.auth.title: Sign in with your wallet
join6529.current.auth.body: Sign once so the app can safely load your 6529 profile state.
join6529.current.auth.error: Wallet sign-in did not complete. Try signing again.
join6529.current.profile.loadingBody: We are looking for an existing 6529 profile attached to this wallet.
join6529.current.profile.title: Create your 6529 profile
join6529.current.profile.body: A profile gives you a handle, identity, and the ability to participate in Waves.
join6529.current.waves.title: Find a public Wave
join6529.current.waves.body: Waves are where the daily conversation happens. Open the public feed and pick one thread to enter.
join6529.current.message.title: Send your first public message
join6529.current.message.body: Reply, ask a question, or say gm in a public Wave. This page will mark the step complete once a recent public drop is detected.
join6529.current.pfp.title: Add your profile image when ready
join6529.current.pfp.body: This step stays incomplete until you upload an image, but everything else is already available.
join6529.current.complete.title: You are in
join6529.current.complete.body: You have the basics covered. Explore Waves to follow conversations, drops, and communities that fit you.
join6529.joining.heading: A simple path into the network.
join6529.joining.wallet.title: Connect a wallet
join6529.joining.wallet.body: Your wallet lets you sign in, hold NFTs, and participate with your own identity.
join6529.joining.profile.title: Set up your profile
join6529.joining.profile.body: Choose how you appear in 6529: avatar, display name, bio, and connected wallets.
join6529.joining.waves.title: Join a Wave
join6529.joining.waves.body: A Wave is a public space where people discuss, create, vote, and coordinate.
join6529.joining.participate.title: Participate
join6529.joining.participate.body: Post, reply, vote, submit work, or follow what others are building.
join6529.joining.collect.title: Collect
join6529.joining.collect.body: Mint active drops when available, buy on secondary markets, or build your collection over time.
join6529.joining.subscribe.title: Subscribe
join6529.joining.subscribe.body: Later, collectors can use remote minting: choose eligible Meme Cards and add non-refundable funds for those choices.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.title: Be ready for future Meme Card drops.
join6529.focus.subscriptions.body: A subscription is remote minting: you choose eligible Meme Cards, add non-refundable funds, and 6529 can mint those chosen cards for you during future drops.
join6529.focus.waves.title: Where the network coordinates.
join6529.focus.waves.body: Waves are topic-based spaces for discussion, creation, voting, and shared decisions. You can browse first, then connect when ready.
join6529.focus.nfts.title: Collect the art and history of 6529.
join6529.focus.nfts.body: The Memes are CC0 (public domain) art. The longer and more Meme Cards you hold, the more TDH (Total Days Held) you earn — a score that gives you real influence over where the network goes.
join6529.faq.heading: Practical questions
join6529.faq.subheading: The basics before you dive in.
join6529.faq.walletEth.question: Do I need a wallet or ETH to start?
join6529.faq.walletEth.answer: No. You can browse first. Connect a wallet when you want to create a profile, post, vote, collect, or subscribe. ETH is only needed for minting, buying, gas, or funding subscriptions.
join6529.faq.tdh.question: What is TDH?
join6529.faq.tdh.answer: TDH means Total Days Held. Holding eligible Meme Cards over time builds TDH, which helps determine voting influence and eligibility across 6529.
join6529.faq.memeCost.question: What does it cost to collect a Meme Card?
join6529.faq.memeCost.answer: The current mint price is 0.06529 ETH plus gas. Meme Cards typically drop Monday, Wednesday, and Friday, with artwork selected through TDH voting.
join6529.faq.subscriptions.question: How do subscriptions work, and are they refundable?
join6529.faq.subscriptions.answer: Subscriptions are remote minting for Meme Cards. Add a non-refundable balance, choose which eligible cards to mint, and skip drops you do not want.
join6529.faq.artUse.question: Can I use the art?
join6529.faq.artUse.answer: Yes. The Memes are CC0, meaning public domain art anyone can use. Holding the cards is what earns TDH over time.
